---
title: "Cunning Woman’s Grandson: A Tale of Cheddar a Hundred Years Ago, The"
---

## Cunning Woman’s Grandson: A Tale of Cheddar a Hundred Years Ago, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1889
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

### Notes

Leeds University Library has <i>A Tale of Cheddar Caves One Hundred Years Ago</i>, with illustrations by W. S. Stacey, published in Wells: Dowman Woodhams n.d, which is presumably a reprint of this book.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
